channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: We recommend mini-LED TVs over OLED TVs if you're looking for a big-screen World Cup upgrade — here's why
item.description: Mini-LED TVs are the better bet for your World Cup viewing, and there are a few key reasons why.

item.title: Italian authorities shut down major streaming piracy network
item.description: The Cinemagoal app retransmitted content from major platforms like Netflix and Disney+.

item.title: Chicks hatched from artificial eggshells, a new mission to study Earth's magnetosphere and more science stories
Europe races Meta and Japan to launch first Petabit-class submarine cable before 2030 as AI demand explodes
item.description: IOEMA-1 advances Northern European subsea cable development while Japan and Meta explore high-capacity systems for global internet expansion.

item.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
item.description: Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks. Here are how those modes work, what they do, and how to switch them on.

item.title: La mutuelle Alan victime d’un grave piratage : des données très sensibles des clients dans la nature
item.description: La mutuelle Alan est la dernière victime en date de la vague de cyberattaques visant la France.

item.title: Une IA d’OpenAI résout un problème de maths qui résistait depuis 80 ans
item.description: Un modèle d'OpenAI a réfuté une conjecture de géométrie posée par Paul Erdős en 1946, et que personne n'avait fait bouger depuis. Plus surprenant : ce n'est pas une IA dédiée aux maths qui a trouvé la solution.

item.title: DeepSeek permanently reduces the price of its flagship V4 model by 75 percent
item.description: The lower prices could be aimed at undercutting the competition.

item.title: Best Power Banks (2026): My Picks After Testing Over 100
item.description: Keep your phone, laptop, handheld gaming console, and other electronics running with these travel-friendly power banks.

item.title: Amazon has the Hisense CanvasTV on sale for the lowest price ever — save up to $900
item.description: The 65-inch Hisense CanvasTV is on sale at Amazon for $1,099.99, down from the list price of $1,999.99. That's a 45% discount.

item.title: Le coup de la panne c’est dépassé avec cette batterie externe Anker 4 ports 25 000 mAh, 165W et deux câbles USB-C intégrés en promo à -20%
item.description: La PowerBank Anker 25 000 mAh 165W avec trois ports USB-C, un port USB-A et deux câbles intégrés est en promo à 79,99 euros au lieu de 99,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
item.description: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.
